title: Rubber Duckies!
description: A mod that adds rubber duckies to the game
body: This is a mod that adds rubber ducks to minecraft. Its inspired by shops that sell rubber ducks for collecting, and just like them it will have ducks featuring popular characters or concepts that i come up with. For now the duckies are just blocks and there are only two of them (See gallery), but im planning to make more variants and change their behavior to be more like boats without being able to sit ine them than just being static blocks.
